data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the acceptance workflow requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the acceptance workflow where a substitute can accept or decline a class assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an acceptance workflow, but without direct evidence of its implementation or operation, the requirement cannot be confirmed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow where substitutes can accept or decline assignments.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the acceptance workflow functionality.
